title: The Importance of Sleep
options: This is particularly true for teenagers.

This creates a gap in concentration levels.
text: Many people underestimate the value of sleep in daily life.

text.answer: This is particularly true for teenagers.

text: They often go to bed late and still have to wake up early for school.

text.answer: As a result, they may suffer academically.

text: Lack of rest affects memory and attention.

text.answer: This creates a gap in concentration levels.
Some researchers suggest starting school later.

text: This might help align with students' natural sleep rhythms.
